title: Yuki's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Yuki plays a gentle peek-a-boo game with her bedtime friends, discovering sleepy animals hiding around her room before settling down for the night.

pages.text: Yuki is ready for bed. Where are her sleepy friends hiding? Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes stands in a cozy bedroom with curtains partially concealing stuffed animals, creating a peek-a-boo composition with playful concealment
illustration.alt: Yuki in pajamas looking around her bedroom for hidden friends

pages.text: Behind the blue curtain... peek-a-boo! It's Teddy Bear, yawning sleepily.

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes pulling back a blue curtain to reveal a drowsy teddy bear, lift the flap inspired design with surprise element and interactive feel
illustration.alt: Yuki revealing a sleepy teddy bear behind a curtain

pages.text: Under the soft blanket... peek-a-boo! Bunny is curled up tight.

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lifting a blanket to discover a sleeping bunny, partially hidden objects composition with behind the curtain style revealing
illustration.alt: Yuki finding a bunny hiding under a blanket

pages.text: Inside the toy box... peek-a-boo! Sleepy owl says 'hoo-hoo' goodnight.

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes opening a toy box lid to reveal a sleepy owl, hiding and revealing composition with peek-a-boo element and playful concealment
illustration.alt: Yuki discovering an owl in her toy box

pages.text: Now Yuki hides too. Peek-a-boo! Under her cozy covers. Sweet dreams, Yuki!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes tucked under blankets with just her eyes peeking out, surrounded by her sleepy animal friends, interactive feel with gentle peek-a-boo composition
illustration.alt: Yuki hiding under covers with her stuffed animal friends nearby

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where did Yuki find Teddy Bear?
questions.explanation: Teddy Bear was hiding behind the blue curtain, yawning sleepily!

questions.question: What did the owl say?
questions.explanation: The sleepy owl said 'hoo-hoo' goodnight to Yuki!

questions.question: Where was Bunny hiding?
questions.explanation: Bunny was curled up tight under the soft blanket!
